title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Back Pain
description: Achillea millefolium tinctures contains sesquiterpene lactones, like achillin and alantolactone, which have anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help reduce swelling and pain in the muscles and joints. The tinctures also contain flavonoids, such as kaempferol and quercetin, which have antioxidant properties that help protect the body from damage caused by free radicals.
